What quest is this used for/got in??? I don't see any listed...

# Dec 29 2009 at 5:51 PM Rating: Decent

3 posts
can get it from kirem deepfacet in PoK
▲ Page top
Does this really drop?
QuoteReply
# May 31 2006 at 2:46 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592791850454
83 posts
Was this something introduced with a recent patch or expansion? I've slaughtered hundreds of Ice Giants, and literally thousands of ghouls in Lower Guk and have only ever seen a topaz drop from an Ukun in Dranik's scar. Any info would be appreciated. Thanks
▲ Page top
RE: Does this really drop?
QuoteReply
# May 31 2006 at 9:36 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Like all merchant sold gems, these can randomly drop off any mob in the game.

However, if you really want to get some, you'd be best off checking one of those multitude of merchants who sell them as regular stock, like Kirem Deepfacet in PoK.
▲ Page top
RE: Does this really drop?
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2006 at 11:15 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592791850454
83 posts
DOH! Was thinking of something else entirely...My apologies
